title: lyonia ligustrina var. pubescens
intro: Lyonia ligustrina var. pubescens, also known as the hairy fetid beech or hairy Lyonia, is a type of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lyonia ligustrina var. pubescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and soothe sore throats and wounds. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often made from the leaves, bark, or roots of the plant.
